instructions: See AGENTS.md for the full engineering workflow. Core rules: (1) No production code without a failing test first — RED→GREEN→REFACTOR. (2) Stop-the-line when tests fail or build breaks — diagnose root cause before touching anything else. (3) Surface all assumptions before implementing. (4) Touch only what the current task requires. (5) Verify before claiming done — evidence, not confidence. Schema: openspec/schemas/ospx-best-practices/schema.yaml
